# Copilot Instructions

## Project Requirements
AI-powered Telegram bot for task management using natural dialogue, DeepSeek AI, PostgreSQL, Redis, Yookassa payments.

## Project Status
- [x] Project scaffolded with Python, aiogram, SQLAlchemy, etc.
- [x] AI chat implemented with tool calling for dynamic task management
- [x] Russian prompts, local testing with SQLite
- [x] No extensions required
- [x] Dependencies installed, no compilation needed
- [x] Test dialogue created and run
- [x] Bot launchable locally with LOCAL=1 or on Railway with webhooks
- [x] Documentation complete in README.md

## Guidelines
- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
